sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15951" key="a)rxi/qronos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχί-θρονος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupying the chief seat, presiding,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.182</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
